## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run verify` passes locally
- [ ] New or changed domain logic is in `packages/core`, not in the extension or API
- [ ] Schema changes are reflected in `packages/schemas`
- [ ] Tests cover new or changed logic
- [ ] Docs are updated where behaviour, routes, or contracts changed
- [ ] No unrelated changes are included in this PR
